# The Absorber - Miracle Chamois

-

-

- [Description](#tab-1)

- [Technical Information](#tab-2)

- [Demo](#tab-3)

**The Absorber is the revolutionary new drying skin from the USA.**

Made of a unique material called PVA (Poly Vinyl Alcohol), The Absorber is vastly superior to a terrycloth towel and leather chamois. A uniform, sponge-like pore structure enhances capillary action, giving The Absorber drying capabilities no other product can match. Besides being the best drying cloth for cars & boats it is soft on materials like fiberglass, The Absorber has endless uses that include: cooling your skin in the summer or after a workout, and drying your dog! With proper care The Absorber lasts for years and can be stored moist and ready to use in its handy tube.

- Super absorbent – Spend less time drying and more time enjoying life with this super absorbent towel

- Soft – Easy on your hands, easy on your car

- Won’t scratch and safe to use on all finishes – Protect your investment

- Resistant to Mold & Mildew – with proper care the Absorber lasts for years

- Tough, durable, built for extreme drying

- Take it anywhere

- Machine washable & re-usable making it an Eco Friendly option

- Handy storage tube – for perfect storage of your Absorber at home or on the go

 Absorber Mini 33x43cm Perfect for keeping in the glove box or boot of the car.

Absorber Large 69x43cm Ideal for keeping at home for cleaning your pride & joy.

## 

- Number 1 in the USA.

- Machine washable when dirty.

- Storage tube with chamois to keep clean & moist.

- Super soft fibres guaranteed not to scratch.
